title: Auto Smelting Enchantment
description: Automatically smelt mined blocks such as iron ore, gold ore, and sand
body:
# Auto Smelting Enchantment

This mod adds an enchantment called "Smelting Touch" that smelts the block drops that you mine. For example, mining sand gives you glass, mining iron ore gives you iron ingot, and mining logs gives you charcoal. 

It can be obtained through the enchantment table and has a max level of 1. It can be applied to pickaxes, shovels, and axes.

It should also be compatable with modded blocks and items that can be smelted.
